/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-unused-result --std=c++17 CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/FDMJAST.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/namemaps.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/semantanlyzer.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/setnamemaps.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/ast2xml.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/xml2ast.cc.o ../../vendor/tinyxml2/CMakeFiles/vendor_xml.dir/tinyxml2.cc.o -o main
